name: Interactive Hero Section
description: A hero section with a pointer/reactive interactive element (parallax, mouse-follow 3D tilt, scroll-linked, or particle field) layered with a strong headline and CTA. The interaction invites engagement without distracting from the value proposition and CTA.

requiredElements.name: reactive-element
requiredElements.description: A reactive element that responds to pointer/scroll (parallax, tilt, or particle field).

requiredElements.name: headline-overlay
requiredElements.description: A headline + subhead overlaid on the interactive element with strong contrast legibility.

requiredElements.name: primary-cta
requiredElements.description: A primary CTA that remains obvious and clickable atop the interaction.

requiredElements.name: legibility-scrim
requiredElements.description: A scrim/gradient behind text guaranteeing legibility regardless of the interactive state behind it.

requiredElements.name: interaction-invites
requiredElements.description: The interaction subtly invites engagement (a gentle idle motion) so users know it's interactive.

optionalElements.name: scroll-cue
optionalElements.description: A scroll cue indicating there's more below.

optionalElements.name: reduced-motion-static
optionalElements.description: A static fallback hero for prefers-reduced-motion.

qualityRules.description: Reaction is smooth and responsive (low latency, eased, no jitter).
A gentle idle motion invites interaction without being noisy.
Headline has scale/weight and is the focal point over the interaction.
Headline legibility guaranteed by scrim (>=4.5:1) in all interactive states.
CTA stays obvious/clickable; interaction never blocks the CTA.
Provides a static fallback for prefers-reduced-motion.
Interaction works with pointer/touch and degrades when no pointer (keyboard nav unaffected).
Hero uses a <header>/<section> with a single h1.
Pointer/scroll handlers throttled to rAF; no per-event heavy work.
Event listeners and rAF loops removed on unmount.

antiPatterns.description: Interaction so busy it distracts from the headline/CTA.
Text that loses contrast when the interactive background changes.
Interaction layer intercepts pointer events on the CTA.
Heavy work on every pointermove/scroll event causes jank.

improvementSuggestions.description: Add a scroll cue to indicate more content below.
Add a static reduced-motion fallback hero.

exampleOutputs.label: Pointer parallax with rAF throttle
